Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Text Ruling

Arash Khakshooy, Esq.,LAW OFFICES OF KENOSIAN & MIELE, LLP, (323)289-0500, arash@kenosianmiele.com, for Plaintiff.
Diana Tarnopolskaya, Esq., ELITE COMP LAW, PC, (925) 407-2121, diana@elitecomplaw.corn
Attorney for Defendant

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

The judgment debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted. (See CCP 704.225 [money in deposit account exempt to extent necessary for support].)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES.

Grant. No opposition filed.

A Proposed Order and Judgment are submitted by Email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
